route: ROUTE 1 - arithmetic / kappa_3 bound on local incidence c_k(q,rho)
target: c_k(q,rho) <= C*rho+1, level-independent C; load-bearing c_k(q,4.44)<=12

observed_exact_lattice_centre_max_c_k.note: max over ALL integer lattice centres q (box-coverage exact), rho=integer

triple_free_check: EXACT: in every densest ball, #distinct primitive chord directions == N-1 (all chords from a walk-point anchor are pairwise non-parallel). Confirmed L6 rho=2..10.

CRUX_local_kappa3_is_vacuous.note: For any two chords of sup-norm<=2rho, |cross component| <= 8*rho^2 <= 800 (rho<=10); v_3 of a nonzero int <=800 is <=6 UNCONDITIONALLY. 3^12=531441 requires chord Cheb-distance ~515, far outside rho<=10.
CRUX_local_kappa3_is_vacuous.conclusion: proven global kappa_3<=12 NEVER binds inside a rho<=10 ball -> contributes ZERO local constraint

route1_effective_bound.form: N-1 <= #undirected primitive directions of sup-norm<=2rho = geomcap(2rho)

verdict: STUCK: kappa_3=12 is a long-range fact, vacuous at local scales; triple-free alone gives only O(rho^3). The O(rho) curve-like law is metric (M-contraction + bounded-step path), not arithmetic.
